lots.title: Eddies in the Mind
lots.thesis_line: A failure mode is the shadow of a training objective, run out of distribution — negativity bias and sycophancy are the same law on two substrates, and the LLM is the Drosophila that lets us finally dissect it.

lots.title: The Utah Blanket Wars
lots.thesis_line: Two luxury-blanket brands fighting each other on Utah freeway billboards are a live field study in tribal cognition — the same failure modes the machine pieces dissect, observed in the wild at seventy miles an hour.

now.title: THE FIELD REPORT · 20 JULY — THE STATION OPENS
